title: TFC Extended
description: TFC with a lot of vanilla added back, as well as some extras.
body:
A pack that aims to add some of vanillas features back to TerraFirmaCraft, including an overhauled, less overpowered version of elytra flight, enchantment, and the nether. 
Also adds some more out there additions such as Create and guns! 

Heavily based on ATFC, with a couple revisions and some recipe changes.
